scope: Google Play closed-testing Android build with one bundled offline ONNX model

bundled_onnx_file.metric: uncompressed ONNX file size inside the release source artifact

play_compressed_download.metric: maximum compressed download size for one supported device configuration

installed_footprint.metric: total installed application footprint after first successful recognition

peak_runtime_pss.metric: peak application TOTAL PSS during the accepted 100-request warm inference sequence

inference_working_memory.metric: peak TOTAL PSS minus idle pre-session TOTAL PSS in the same process
